title: Adalium
description: You won't find a darker mine than this!
body:
This mod introduces a brand-new experience to the game, centered around the mysterious power of Adalium.

Discover Adalium Ore, a rare and powerful resource hidden deep within a dark and dangerous underground. Use it to craft Adalium Armor and unique items that will aid you on your journey.

Step into the Adaland Dimension, a shadowy realm where darkness dominates and secrets await to be uncovered. This eerie dimension offers new challenges, exploration opportunities, and a completely different atmosphere from the overworld.

Features:

New ore: Adalium
New dimension: Adaland
Custom armor and items
Dark, immersive mining experience

This mod is inspired by the unreleased Adalium Mod concept.

Showcase video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bsn4D90PJ_I

Credits:
Original idea inspired by Adal
